common.unsavedDescription: You have unsaved changes. Discard changes?

abandonDialog.title: Abandon this shopping trip?
abandonDialog.description: All items will be removed from the cart.

checkoutDialog.title: Complete shopping trip?
checkoutDialog.description: Quantities will be updated based on your cart.

empty.title: No items yet.
empty.description: Add pantry items to see them here.

emptyFiltered.title: No items match the current filters.
emptyFiltered.description: Try adjusting or clearing your filters.

cooking.emptyState: No recipes yet. Create your first recipe to get started.

empty.title: No recipes yet.
empty.description: Add recipes in Settings to get started.

cancelDialog.title: Discard all selections?
cancelDialog.description: All recipe selections and amount adjustments will be reset.

empty.title: No items yet.
empty.description: Add your first pantry item to get started.

empty.title: No tag types yet.
empty.description: Create a tag type to start organizing your items.

assignEmpty.title: No tags assigned.
assignEmpty.description: Tap a tag above to assign it to this item.

assignEmpty.title: No vendors assigned.
assignEmpty.description: Tap a vendor above to assign it to this item.

assignEmpty.title: No recipes assigned.
assignEmpty.description: Tap a recipe above to assign it to this item.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose light, dark, or system theme

tagType.deleteWithTags_one: We are about to delete "{{name}}" and its 1 associated tag, removing it from all assigned items.
tagType.deleteWithTags_other: We are about to delete "{{name}}" and its {{count}} associated tags, removing them from all assigned items.
tagType.deleteNoTags: It's safe to delete "{{name}}" since no tag belongs to it.

tag.deleteWithItems_one: We are about to delete "{{name}}", removing it from 1 item.
tag.deleteWithItems_other: We are about to delete "{{name}}", removing it from {{count}} items.
tag.deleteNoItems: It's safe to delete "{{name}}" since no item is using it.

empty.title: No items yet.
empty.description: Items tagged here will appear in this list.

items.emptyFiltered: No items match the current filters.

empty.title: No vendors yet.
empty.description: Tap + to add your first vendor.

empty.title: No items yet.
empty.description: Items assigned to this vendor will appear here.

recipes.label: Recipes

empty.title: No recipes yet.
empty.description: Tap + to add your first recipe.

recipes.deleteWithItems_one: "{{name}}" will be deleted. It contains 1 item. Your inventory will not be affected.
recipes.deleteWithItems_other: "{{name}}" will be deleted. It contains {{count}} items. Your inventory will not be affected.
recipes.deleteNoItems: "{{name}}" will be deleted. It has no items.

empty.title: No items yet.
empty.description: Items linked to this recipe will appear here.

local.title: Offline Mode
local.description: Data is stored on this device only. No internet connection needed. Cannot share with family members.

familyWarnDialog.title: You're in a family group
familyWarnDialog.description: Other family members may lose access to shared items or see outdated versions in the future. Do you want to continue?

copyDialog.title: Copy your cloud data to local storage?
copyDialog.description: Your cloud data will be copied to this device.

conflictDialog.title: Local storage already has items
conflictDialog.description: How should we handle your existing local data?

enableDialog.title: Switch to cloud mode?
enableDialog.description: Once switched, your data will be stored in the cloud. You will be able to collaborate with family members, but signing in will be required.

familyGroup.title: Family group
familyGroup.description: Share your pantry with family members

leaveDialog.title: Leave family group?
leaveDialog.description: You will no longer have access to the shared pantry.

disbandDialog.title: Disband family group?
disbandDialog.description: All members will lose access to the shared pantry. This cannot be undone.

export.label: Download my data
export.description: Export all data as a JSON backup

import.label: Import data
import.description: Restore data from a JSON backup file

conflictDialog.title: Conflicts detected
conflictDialog.description: Some items in the file already exist in your data. How would you like to handle them?
